name: io.github.codespar/banco-do-brasil
description: MCP server for Banco do Brasil — Brazil's top public bank. Pix, Cobrança (boleto), Conta-Corrente, and Arrecadação via BB's Developer Portal APIs (OAuth2 + mTLS).

environmentVariables.name: BB_CLIENT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Banco do Brasil OAuth client_id issued via developers.bb.com.br after contract onboarding.

environmentVariables.name: BB_DEVELOPER_APP_KEY
environmentVariables.description: BB Developer App Key (gw-dev-app-key) — appended as a query param on most BB API calls.

environmentVariables.name: BB_CERT_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to the mTLS client certificate (.crt or .pem). BACEN mandates mTLS for Pix v2 in production.

environmentVariables.name: BB_KEY_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to the mTLS private key (.key or .pem).
